inv.asdl

Overview

MOSbius v1 Devices: Inverter
Inverter with split NMOS and PMOS gate inputs.
Sized to 16x standard MOSbius unit devices.

Imports

Alias

Path

Description

gf

gf180mcu.asdl

gf180mcu pdk library

Modules

inv

Overview

Inverter module

Interface

Name

Description

$inp

PMOS gate input

$inn

NMOS gate input

$out

Output

$vss

VSS

$vdd

VDD, nominal 3.3V

Instances

Instance

Ref

Params

Description

mn

gf.nfet_03v3

L=0.5u W=5u NF=6 m=16

NMOS 16x

mp

gf.pfet_03v3

L=0.5u W=5u NF=6 m=3*16

PMOS 16x, P:N ratio 3:1

Used by

  • top_mosbius_devices_v1_nmos

Nets

Name

Endpoints

Description

$inp

mp.g

PMOS gate input

$inn

mn.g

NMOS gate input

$out

mn.d, mp.d

Output

$vdd
